recent_history.details:
Hi Ken, attached is a copy of your contract for your to sign, update and
return to us.
A per our conversation the following is the breakdown of your charges.

24ft @ $131.00 per ft = $3144.00
4ft @ $96.00 per ft =      $ 384.00
+ HST                            $ 458.00
-----------------------------------------------------
Total              $3986.64
Less deposit    $1000.00
------------------------------------------------
Balance          $2986.64    due March 1st 2025

Thanking you in advance for your attention to this matter.

Regards

Carol Anderson
Customer Service
Wiarton Marina LTD.
Box 1270 Bayview Street
Wiarton On. N0H 2T0
PH 519 534 1301
FX 855 568 9498

Good news.  We got the Handheld Contact side of things working.  See the image here:

questions.answer:
No meetings scheduled for February 4, 2026 (today).

**Recent activity (most recent shown):**
- Sales Call – Attempted: “APC US Campaign (Dec 29) RTG 1 web 2 RDB” with Sherry Falk (SBF Search LLC) — October 1, 2025 (5 minutes)
- Call Completed: “APC Campaign” with Scott Fabean (TRA) — April 30, 2025 (5 minutes)
- To-do Done: “APC Campaign: Slacked Tony to move them this year” (note: “Tony does not want to transition them at this time.”) with Lisa Richards (Hospitality Softnet, Inc.) — April 11, 2025
- To-do Not Done: “Pay Balance of WML CONTRACT ($2839.74)” with Carol Anderson (Wiarton Marina Ltd.) — February 3, 2025
- Call Completed: “Post Purchase Follow-up - 30 Days” with Stewart Boro — February 1, 2025 (Vic to send quote; install hoped for Family Day)

**Pipeline + follow-ups to watch:**
- 5 open opportunities totaling **$4,347.85** (weighted total **$878.92**); largest is Quantech Software.com Inc. at **$2,800.00** (10% probability; stage: Initial Communication; estimated close date December 12, 2022).
- 5 overdue follow-ups in the list, including Devin Hulett (Home And Property Real Estate Ltd; call campaign date May 21, 2024) and Don Bergis (Regent Financial & Insurance Services; last email October 30, 2017).
questions.action:
1. Call Sherry Falk at SBF Search LLC on Feb 4, 2026 to reattempt “APC US Campaign” outreach.  
2. Review and update Quantech Software.com Inc. opportunity stage/probability and set a new close date by Feb 4, 2026.  
3. Call Devin Hulett at Home And Property Real Estate Ltd on Feb 4, 2026 to complete the overdue follow-up.  
4. Email Don Bergis at Regent Financial & Insurance Services on Feb 4, 2026 to re-engage after the last email (Oct 30, 2017).
questions.answer_guidance: Data: today_meetings[] (each with meeting{} from calendar.items, contacts[] with full details, history[] for those contacts, opportunities[] linked via contacts.companyID), recent_history[], open_opportunities[], overdue_followups[] (contacts missing lastAttempt or > 7 days). Show for each meeting: time, subject, attendee names, recent history summary, linked opportunities.
questions.action_guidance: If today_meetings has meetings with contacts[]: 1) WHO: Extract contacts[0].fullName and contacts[0].emailAddress from today_meetings[0], 2) WHAT: draft pre-meeting email referencing history[0].details if available, confirming the meeting and asking about agenda priorities, 3) WHEN: send at least 1 hour before meeting.startTime. Include: subject line, greeting, body, sign-off. FALLBACK: If no meetings with contacts, use overdue_followups[0]: extract fullName and emailAddress, draft check-in email. Log outreach as History in Act!.

fetched_data.duckdb: GROUP BY period; SUM weighted; calc days_overdue; JOIN contacts for primary

questions.answer: Forecast health is **poor**: there are **0 deals** forecasted in the next **30/60/90 days** (weighted **$0** in each bucket) and **100.0%** of pipeline is at risk due to slipped close dates. Total open pipeline is **$55,633.23** with **$27,067.23** weighted, but it’s entirely in **slipped deals** (10 open opps), including overdue close dates like **December 12, 2022** (Quantech Software.com Inc., **$280.00** weighted) and **April 30, 2024** (New Quote, **$1,694.25** weighted).
questions.action:
1. Sales manager reviews all 10 slipped deals and updates close dates and next steps by end of week  
2. Account owner contacts Quantech Software.com Inc. to revalidate timeline and update the $280.00 weighted opportunity by tomorrow  
3. Opportunity owner follows up on New Quote to confirm stage and revise the April 30, 2024 close date by tomorrow  
4. Sales ops flags 100.0% at-risk pipeline in Act! CRM and schedules a pipeline review meeting for next business day
questions.answer_guidance: Data: forecast_30d/60d/90d (each with deals[], weighted, count), slipped_deals[] sorted by value with _days_overdue, _primary_contact{name, email, phone}, beyond_90d_count (deals > 90 days out), no_date_count (opps missing close date), total_pipeline, total_weighted (all dated opps including >90d). Show: forecast by period, slipped deals needing attention, note beyond_90d_count and no_date_count.
questions.action_guidance: For slipped_deals[0] (highest value, most urgent): 1) WHO: _primary_contact.name with _primary_contact.phone or email. FALLBACK: If _primary_contact is null, use contactNames or assign deal owner to identify stakeholder, 2) WHAT: urgent call to reconfirm close date - ask about blockers and timeline. After call: update estimatedCloseDate in Act! and log call as History, 3) WHEN: call TODAY - deal is _days_overdue days past expected close. ALSO: If no_date_count > 0, note that X deals need estimatedCloseDate populated for accurate forecasting.

questions.question: At-risk deals

at_risk_deals.name: Colorado Real Estate Journal - Thursday, April 28...(#KEYQ18739)

fetched_data.duckdb: filter risk; JOIN history(contacts+companies); ORDER BY severity

questions.answer:
There are **10 at-risk deals**, all flagged **Overdue**, totaling **$4,797.85** in value.

- **Largest at-risk deal:** Quantech Software.com Inc. - Wednesday, April ...(#KEYQ18702-01) — **$2,800.00**, **10%**, closes **December 12, 2022**, **1151** days overdue (Mgr: **Jean McCandlish**)
- **Next largest:** Colorado Real Estate Journal - Thursday, April 28...(#KEYQ18739) — **$700.00**, **25%**, closes **December 12, 2022**, **1151** days overdue (Mgr: **Jean McCandlish**)
- **Other overdue deals (value | probability | close date | manager):**
  - Rademacher Support — **$740.00** | 50% | **December 30, 2022** | Jean McCandlish
  - Act4Outlook — **$107.85** | 50% | **January 6, 2023** | Jean McCandlish
  - Dynamite Window Washing — **$450.00** | 50% | **January 31, 2023** | Victor Krahn

**Last touch** and **primary contact** are **data not available** for all listed at-risk deals.
questions.action:
1. Jean McCandlish to review and update stage/close dates for Quantech Software.com Inc. (#KEYQ18702-01) by tomorrow.  
2. Jean McCandlish to call Colorado Real Estate Journal (#KEYQ18739) and log next-step activity by end of week.  
3. Jean McCandlish to request primary contact and last-touch details for Rademacher Support and Act4Outlook by Friday.  
4. Victor Krahn to contact Dynamite Window Washing and either reforecast or close-lost the deal by Friday.
questions.answer_guidance: Data: at_risk_deals[] with name, company (from opp.companies[0] or contact.company fallback), value, probability, risk_reason (Stalled/Overdue/Low-activity), days_in_stage, last_touch (via contacts.companyID), primary_contact{name, email, phone}. Sorted by severity (Overdue first). Show: deal name, company, value, risk_reason, days_in_stage, last_touch, primary contact.
questions.action_guidance: For at_risk_deals[0] (highest severity): 1) WHO: Extract primary_contact.name and primary_contact.phone or primary_contact.email from the deal. FALLBACK: If primary_contact is null, create task: 'Identify stakeholder for [deal name]' assigned to manager, 2) WHAT: recovery action based on risk_reason - Stalled: schedule alignment call; Overdue: reconfirm timeline and update estimatedCloseDate; Low-activity: reach out referencing last_touch. Log as History in Act!, 3) WHEN: take action TODAY - at-risk deals need immediate attention.

questions.question: Account momentum

fetched_data.duckdb: GROUP BY company; SUM pipeline; JOIN contacts for top_contact; sort reactivate by staleness

questions.answer: Rapid Concrete Solutions shows the strongest momentum with $540 in SAVE pipeline, but there’s no recorded recent engagement (eng30 = 0) and no last touch date/contact (data not available). Keystroke - Quebec has $34 in SAVE pipeline and likewise has no recent engagement in the last 30 days (eng30 = 0) and no last touch details (data not available).
questions.action:
1. Assign account manager to contact Rapid Concrete Solutions by Feb 7 to record a last touch date and next step  
2. Schedule a discovery call with Rapid Concrete Solutions by Feb 9 to validate the $540 SAVE pipeline and timeline  
3. Assign account manager to email Keystroke - Quebec by Feb 7 to confirm status of the $34 SAVE pipeline and log engagement
questions.answer_guidance: Data: expand[], save[], reactivate[] - each company with name, id, pipeline (sum of opps via contacts.companyID), eng30 (engagement last 30 days via history.contacts.companyID), last (last touch), last_touch_days, category, top_contact{name, email, phone} (most recently engaged). Show: categorized company lists with pipeline value, engagement metrics, and top contact.
questions.action_guidance: For save[0] (highest pipeline at churn risk): 1) WHO: Extract top_contact.name, top_contact.phone or top_contact.email, and company name from save[0]. FALLBACK: If top_contact is null, create task: 'Identify stakeholder at [company name] via LinkedIn', 2) WHAT: proactive check-in call - acknowledge it's been last_touch_days days since contact, ask about current priorities and concerns. Log call as History in Act!, 3) WHEN: schedule call within 3 business days - declining engagement signals churn risk.

questions.question: Relationship gaps

relationship_analysis.opp: Silvia Test2 - Create quote using existing opportunity
Silvia Test - Create Quote from Scratch
Silvia Test - Create quote from Template

fetched_data.duckdb: COUNT engaged; flag single_threaded; find dark_contacts (sorted by staleness)

questions.answer:
All 10 opportunities show major relationship gaps: **0 engaged contacts**, **all are single-threaded**, and **no dark contacts are listed**.

- Highest-value gaps: **Quantech Software.com Inc. - Wednesday, April ...(#KEYQ18702-01)** ($2,800), **Silvia Test2 - Create quote using existing opportunity** ($1,958.40), **Silvia Test 3 - Create from Template** ($1,916.85), **New Quote** ($1,694.25).  
- Company linkage is also missing: **company = data not available** for all listed opportunities.
questions.action:
1. Assign sales ops to link a Company to all 10 opportunities by end of week.  
2. Have the owner add at least two engaged contacts to Quantech Software.com Inc. - Wednesday, April ...(#KEYQ18702-01) by tomorrow.  
3. Have the owner add at least two engaged contacts to Silvia Test2 - Create quote using existing opportunity by tomorrow.  
4. Have the owner add at least two engaged contacts to Silvia Test 3 - Create from Template and New Quote by tomorrow.
questions.answer_guidance: Data: relationship_analysis[] with opp (deal name), company (from opp.companies or contact.company), value, engaged (count), single_threaded (bool), dark_contacts[] sorted by staleness (null lastReach first) with name, title, lastReach, channel, email, phone. Sorted by single_threaded first, then value desc. Show: deals with engagement count, single-threaded flag, and dark contacts prioritized by staleness.
questions.action_guidance: For first single_threaded deal in relationship_analysis[]: 1) WHO: Extract from dark_contacts[0]: state the contact's name, their title, and include their email (dark_contacts[0].email) or phone (dark_contacts[0].phone). FALLBACK: If dark_contacts is empty or all have channel='None', create task: 'Research [company] stakeholders on LinkedIn', 2) WHAT: draft email/call script to multi-thread - greet by name, introduce yourself, reference the opp name and company, ask about their priorities. After outreach: log as History in Act! linked to contact and opportunity, 3) WHEN: complete outreach within 3 business days - single-threaded = high risk.
